title: turnera gouveiana
intro: Turnera gouveiana, also known as Yellow Passion Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Turnera gouveiana include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams to leverage its medicinal properties.
